items.name: Vineaconda - Stranger Things: Tales from '85
items.description: Twisting vine tentacle with lighting-fast moves. Not sure you’ll outrun this one! Attend the Watch Party in Dead Rails to earn your badge and claim this free UGC limited item in "The Block" Roblox experience while supplies last.

items.name: Vine Dog - Stranger Things: Tales from '85
items.description: A hound mutated from the vines of the upside down. Maybe don’t play fetch with it…Attend the Watch Party in Evade to earn your badge and claim this free UGC limited item in "The Block" Roblox experience while supplies last.
